title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: National Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, National Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About National Insurance:
National Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with National Insurance!
